ledger.title: Capabilities tied to real deliverables
ledger.description: Each service is defined by outputs, owners, and checkpoints so you can see what is actually being delivered before the project advances.

howWeWork.title: A structured path from feasibility to handover
howWeWork.description: Every project moves through four decision-gated phases: lot and feasibility review, concept and cost alignment, permit-ready documentation, and managed execution.
howWeWork.step1Description: We evaluate your lot, program, and budget range. Site constraints, zoning, and HOA requirements are documented before any design work begins.
howWeWork.step2Description: Design and builder teams align scope, systems, and cost targets. You approve the schematic direction before drawings advance.
howWeWork.step3Description: Construction documents are coordinated across all trades. Bid-ready scopes, a milestone schedule, and permit submittals are prepared for review.
howWeWork.step4Description: Construction is managed through QA checkpoints and weekly owner reporting. Punch completion and warranty orientation close out the project.
howWeWork.ctaDescription: If you already have a lot, a target area, or an early budget range, we can usually tell you quickly whether the project is ready for the next phase.

blueprint.title: Process defined by decision gates
blueprint.description: Each phase has clear inputs, outputs, and approval thresholds. Nothing moves forward without alignment.

trust.title: Confidence built through evidence, not claims
trust.description: Our process is designed to reduce surprises and keep design quality intact during execution.
trust.point1Description: Key approvals are explicit at every stage, from concept alignment to release-to-build.
trust.point2Description: Design intent and construction realities are coordinated before field execution.
trust.point3Description: Progress, issues, and next decisions are communicated in plain language and on cadence.

whyChooseUs.title: Why serious DFW clients choose this process
whyChooseUs.description: The advantage is not just design taste. It is tighter cost control, fewer handoff mistakes, clearer approvals, and stronger execution across the full project lifecycle.
whyChooseUs.reason1Description: One team carries your project from schematic design through final punch list. That single point of accountability eliminates the costly miscommunications that plague traditional designer-then-contractor workflows.
whyChooseUs.reason2Description: We know Dallas–Fort Worth down to the soil reports. Expansive clay conditions, municipality-specific permitting timelines, HOA design review boards—our local expertise keeps your project moving without avoidable delays.
whyChooseUs.reason3Description: Every line item, allowance, and change order is visible to you in real time. Our open-book budgeting and documented decision gates mean you approve costs before they're committed—never after.
whyChooseUs.reason4Description: Vetted trade partners, third-party inspections at every critical milestone, and construction detailing that honors the original design intent. The result is a home that performs as well as it photographs.
whyChooseUs.reason5Description: Your priorities—not ours—define the project. We listen before we draw, confirm before we build, and adapt when your needs evolve. Every decision is yours to make with clear data behind it.
whyChooseUs.reason6Description: Every approval, specification, and change order is recorded and accessible. A complete paper trail protects your investment and ensures nothing agreed upon gets lost between design and construction.

testimonials.title: Selected client proof from across DFW

about.metaDescription: All-in-one residential design studio founded by a husband-and-wife team with 10+ years in drafting, interior design, construction coordination, and custom cabinetry across DFW & North Texas.
about.heroTitle: A true all-in-one studio for residential design and construction
about.heroDescription: From drafting and floor plans to interior design, construction coordination, and custom cabinetry — every detail is handled by our team, in one place. Our integrated approach eliminates the need to juggle multiple vendors, allowing for a seamless process, a cohesive design vision, and efficient execution from concept to completion.
about.principle1Description: One team, one timeline, one direction. No handoffs between designer, builder, and cabinetmaker — and no gaps where details fall through.
about.principle2Description: Every drawing, finish, and cabinet is coordinated against the same design intent, so the home reads as one considered space rather than a patchwork of vendors.
about.principle3Description: We don't repeat floor plans or reuse spec packages. Every project is shaped around the family who will live in it — the way they move, cook, host, and rest.
about.stat1Detail: Across Dallas, Fort Worth, Frisco, Southlake, Prosper, and Highland Park.
about.stat2Detail: Driven by critical-path scheduling and proactive trade coordination.
about.stat3Detail: Structured approval checkpoints that prevent budget surprises and scope drift.
about.stat4Detail: A dedicated project manager from preconstruction through warranty.
about.valuesTitle: What sets us apart across the region
about.value1Description: Drafting, floor plans, interior design, construction coordination, and custom cabinetry all live on the same team. You never have to translate intent across vendors or chase accountability when something doesn't match the drawings.
about.value2Title: A design vision that stays intact
about.value2Description: Because the same people design the space and coordinate its construction, decisions made on paper show up in the finished home. Nothing gets value-engineered into something it was never meant to be.
about.value3Description: Fewer handoffs means fewer delays. Our integrated approach compresses the number of meetings, clarifications, and rework loops that usually stretch residential projects past their deadline.
about.storyTitle: Founded by a husband-and-wife team with 10+ years in residential design and construction
about.storyImageAlt: Founders of Premium Home Design reviewing architectural plans on site
about.storyLead: At Premium Home Design, we provide a true all-in-one experience for residential projects.
about.storyParagraph1: From drafting and floor plans to interior design, construction coordination, and custom cabinetry design, every detail is handled by our team — all in one place.
about.storyParagraph2: Our integrated approach eliminates the need to work with multiple vendors, allowing for a seamless process, a cohesive design vision, and efficient execution from concept to completion.
about.storyParagraph3: Founded by a husband-and-wife team with over 10 years of experience in residential design and construction, we are committed to delivering thoughtful, well-executed spaces tailored to each client.

dfwPage.metaDescription: Custom home design-build service area covering Dallas-Fort Worth & North Texas (Sherman, Denton, Weatherford) — across the DFW Metroplex & North Texas.
dfwPage.ogTitle: Service Area | DFW · North Texas Design-Build
dfwPage.ogDescription: Custom home design-build service area covering Dallas-Fort Worth & North Texas across the DFW Metroplex.
dfwPage.title: Custom homes across DFW & North Texas
dfwPage.description: Regional focus is a strategic choice. Across the DFW Metroplex & North Texas, we deliver better outcomes — fluent permitting across multiple jurisdictions, deeper trade networks, and construction methods proven for North Texas conditions.
dfwPage.stat1Detail: DFW is the 4th largest metro in the U.S.
dfwPage.stat4Detail: Varies by city, lot, and finishes
dfwPage.citiesDescription: We accept projects in the following cities and their surrounding neighborhoods, spanning DFW & North Texas.
dfwPage.why1Description: Years of building across DFW & North Texas means we work with the same vetted subcontractors project after project. This reduces risk, improves quality, and keeps timelines tight.
dfwPage.why2Description: Every municipality has different codes, review timelines, and inspection processes. We know the specifics for each city we serve — from Highland Park's design review board to Prosper's rapid-growth infrastructure requirements.
dfwPage.why3Description: North Texas has expansive clay soils, summer heat loads, and storm patterns that demand specific foundation, envelope, and drainage strategies. Our methods are tuned for North Texas conditions, not generic best practices.
dfwPage.policy1: Active project intake covers the DFW Metroplex & North Texas.
dfwPage.policy2: Project pages and recommendations are scoped to North Texas market realities.
dfwPage.policy3: Out-of-area inquiries beyond the corridor are redirected to local partner recommendations when possible.

forBuildersPage.metaTitle: Architectural Drafting Services — DFW & North Texas | Outsourced Construction Documents
forBuildersPage.metaDescription: Outsource permit-ready construction documents, custom home floor plans, and 3D renders to a regional drafting partner. 7-10 day turnaround for builders across Dallas-Fort Worth & North Texas.
forBuildersPage.ogDescription: Permit-ready custom home floor plans, 3D renders, and construction documents for builders across DFW & North Texas. 7-10 day turnaround.
forBuildersPage.heroAriaLabel: Premium Custom Home Design and Visualization for DFW builders
forBuildersPage.heroTitle: Designed with Vision. Built with Confidence.
forBuildersPage.heroDescription: Working with our team to realize your dream home is a collaborative journey. We transform initial ideas into detailed concept plans and bring them to life with realistic 3D visualizations, ensuring every detail is refined before construction begins.
forBuildersPage.bespokeSubtitle: Bespoke Designs Tailored to Your Lifestyle.
forBuildersPage.bespokeDescription: Working with our team to realize your dream home is a collaborative journey. We transform initial ideas into detailed concept plans and bring them to life with realistic 3D visualizations, ensuring every detail is refined before construction begins.
forBuildersPage.servicesTitle: Execution rigor with verified quality checkpoints
forBuildersPage.servicesDescription: Our operational side ensures your custom designs are perfectly translated into permit-ready construction documents for predictable execution.
forBuildersPage.service1Summary: Dimensioned plans ready for permit and field use.
forBuildersPage.service2Summary: Photorealistic renders for client presentations and marketing.
forBuildersPage.service3Summary: Complete drawing sets formatted for your local jurisdiction.
forBuildersPage.service4Summary: Coordination with structural engineers and foundation plans.
forBuildersPage.service5Summary: Mechanical, electrical, and plumbing coordination drawings.
forBuildersPage.service6Summary: Exterior elevations and building sections with material callouts.
forBuildersPage.projectsTitle: Drafting packages delivered for regional custom homes
forBuildersPage.projectsDescription: Recent documentation packages produced for builders across DFW & North Texas — from schematic floor plans to permit-ready construction documents.
forBuildersPage.processTitle: From brief to permit-ready in four phases
forBuildersPage.processDescription: Every engagement follows a structured workflow. No ambiguity, no scope creep — clear deliverables at each gate.
forBuildersPage.processStep1Desc: We review your plans, scope, and timeline requirements. Site constraints, lot survey, and HOA/city requirements are cataloged before any drafting begins.
forBuildersPage.processStep2Desc: Floor plans, elevations, and initial 3D views are developed from your direction. Revisions are tracked and coordinated before advancing to CDs.
forBuildersPage.processStep3Desc: Complete drawing sets including structural coordination, MEP layouts, sections, and details. Delivered as 2 printed 11×17 sets plus PDF via email, formatted for your permit jurisdiction.
forBuildersPage.processStep4Desc: We handle revision rounds from city review, coordinate with engineers of record, and deliver final permit-ready documents in your preferred format.
forBuildersPage.whyTitle: Scale your output without scaling your team
forBuildersPage.whyDescription: Partnering with a dedicated drafting team means consistent quality, faster permits, and zero overhead.
forBuildersPage.valueProp1Desc: Scale drafting capacity without hiring full-time staff or managing CAD licenses.
forBuildersPage.valueProp2Desc: We know the submission requirements for Dallas, Fort Worth, Frisco, Plano, Sherman, and other cities across DFW & North Texas.
forBuildersPage.valueProp3Desc: Every set follows the same QA checklist — consistent output across all your projects.
forBuildersPage.valueProp4Desc: Schematic sets delivered in 7–10 business days.
forBuildersPage.valueProp5Desc: Plans delivered as printed 11×17 sets and PDF via email — ready for the field.
forBuildersPage.faqDescription: Straight answers on pricing, turnaround, and how the partnership works.
forBuildersPage.faq1Content: We offer custom home plans, detailed construction drawings, and photorealistic 3D visualizations. We also assist with material selections, design direction, and builder coordination.
forBuildersPage.faq2Content: Yes, we regularly partner with builders as their design and drafting team, providing seamless support from concept to build-ready plans.
forBuildersPage.faq3Title: Can you help with design decisions?
forBuildersPage.faq3Content: Absolutely. We guide clients through layout, materials, and overall design direction to ensure a cohesive and functional result.
forBuildersPage.faq4Content: We combine design, drafting, and real construction experience, allowing us to create plans that are not only beautiful but also practical and buildable.
forBuildersPage.faq5Content: We price per project based on scope and square footage. Volume partners receive tiered pricing — the more homes per month, the lower the per-project cost. Request a quote for a custom rate card.
forBuildersPage.faq6Content: Schematic sets are delivered in 7–10 business days. We work at the client's pace — no phase moves forward until the current one is fully approved.
forBuildersPage.faq7Content: We work at the client's pace. We do not move forward to the next phase until the current one is fully approved, ensuring complete satisfaction at every step.
forBuildersPage.faq8Content: No long-term contract required. You can start with a single project to evaluate quality and turnaround before committing to volume pricing.
forBuildersPage.formDescription: Tell us about your volume and project types. We'll respond within 1 business day with scope and pricing.
forBuildersPage.formSidebarDesc: We evaluate your typical project scope, volume, and turnaround needs to build a tailored drafting workflow.
forBuildersPage.formStep3: Approve and start your first project.
forBuildersPage.formProjectPlaceholder: Typical project types, preferred software output (Revit, AutoCAD), turnaround expectations…
forBuildersPage.formResponseNote: We respond to all builder inquiries within 1 business day.
